features: Premium Material :Our hair scrunchies are made with premium soft fabrics that are healthy and eco-friendly, wear-resistant and durable

Rich colors: 6 Pcs soft hair ties, 6 different color combinations, different color styles are enough to meet your daily wear and match, adorn ponytails and braids, making you attractive and elegant in the crowd
Size: Our hair scrunchies are 11 cm / 4.3 inches in diameter, good size for adults teens and girls

Comfortable design:The elastic inside of the rubber band is very good, and the outer fabric is soft, which can fix your hairstyle very well, and will not slip off easily, avoid messy hair, prevent hair loss and do not hurt your hair

Wide range of applications:Our hair ties are both beautiful and functional, you can use them to hold your hair in place for outdoor sports, office work and workouts, or use them to decorate your hair for a variety of parties and everyday wear
